## AI Usage and Attribution
This project requires mandatory commit signing (DCO). If you used AI tools (Copilot, ChatGPT, etc.), you must follow our audit signature pattern.

**Important:** The primary author's signature (`Signed-off-by`) is **mandatory** for all commits, even if no AI was used.

### Signature format if AI was used:
```text
Signed-off-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
Assisted-by: AI Model Name [Provider]
Signed-off-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
```

### Signature format if NO AI was used:
```text
Signed-off-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
```

- [ ] [MANDATORY] I have signed off my commits.
- [ ] I have declared AI usage (if applicable) following the format above.
- [ ] I have personally reviewed every line of code generated by AI to ensure there are no bugs, security vulnerabilities, or performance issues.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
